zones.message: The core is Electron-free — it must not import the shell (src/main). Use a platform port (src/core/ports) or src/shared.
The core must not import the renderer. Share types via src/shared; reach behavior over IPC.
The core must not import the preload bridge. Use src/shared or a port.
The renderer must not import the core directly — share types via src/shared and reach behavior over IPC.

paths.name: electron
paths.message: The core is Electron-free — reach the platform through a port (src/core/ports).

patterns.message: The core is Electron-free — reach the platform through a port (src/core/ports).
